recommendation.evidenceCollection: Collect a balanced set across easy fixed-goal, tempo, interval, and pause/timer cases instead of only more narrow warmup/work/open-cooldown examples.
recommendation.phase3Strategy: Keep Phase 3 blocked. If later approved, split it into debug-only subclasses: Gate A easy fixed-goal first, narrow no-tail tempo second, repeat-block intervals third, and pause/timer semantics as a first-class cross-cutting requirement.
